name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: New Orleans, LA — 5 Star Car Title Loans on Elysian Fields Ave offers title loans and payday advances with same-day funding for qualified borrowers.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans operates at 2642 Elysian Fields Ave in New Orleans, LA as a standalone title loan storefront. The location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 5 PM, giving New Orleans residents convenient access during weekday evenings and weekend mornings. The Elysian Fields location is equipped to handle title loan applications and processing year-round.

This New Orleans location specializes in title loans and payday advances for residents who need quick access to cash. The experienced team at 504-294-5042 can explain how title loans work in LA, discuss your vehicle's potential value, and walk you through the application process. Same-day funding is often available for qualified applicants with valid identification and vehicle documentation.

If you're in New Orleans and need emergency cash against your vehicle title, this Elysian Fields Ave location makes the process straightforward and fast. Bring your driver's license or state ID, proof of residence, proof of income, and vehicle registration to your appointment. 5 Star Car Title Loans focuses on helping New Orleans residents access needed funds without credit checks.
address: 2642 Elysian Fields Ave, New Orleans, LA 70117

company_info.headquarters: 2642 Elysian Fields Ave, New Orleans, LA 70117

pros: Established lender operating since 2012 with 255,000+ loans funded
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle throughout the loan term
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
Loan amounts range from $100 to $50,000 based on vehicle equity
Accepts non-standard collateral including motorcycles and semi-trucks
Licensed and regulated lender with 256-bit SSL/TLS-secured application
cons: No APR, interest rate ranges, or representative loan cost examples disclosed on the website
Only 11 public reviews available despite claiming 255,000+ funded loans—limited independent verification
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence if the borrower defaults
Available in only approximately 18 states; availability and terms vary by state regulation
Title loans are inherently high-cost products; poor credit acceptance comes at a price not shown upfront
best_for: Vehicle owners with significant equity who need fast cash and cannot qualify for personal loans
Borrowers with damaged or no credit history who are ineligible for bank or credit union products
People facing a short-term financial emergency who can repay quickly to minimize interest costs
Borrowers needing more than typical payday or cash advance limits ($1,000–$50,000 range)
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best suited for vehicle owners with clear title who need fast cash and have exhausted lower-cost options such as credit union PALs, personal loans, or employer advances. The main caveat is that the company does not publicly disclose rates or APR, which is a red flag for any consumer finance product—borrowers must request a full written cost disclosure before committing, as title loan APRs can be extremely high and vehicle loss is the consequence of default.
services: Installment loans (fixed payments, up to 24 months)
meta_description: New Orleans, LA: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2642 Elysian Fields Ave offers title loans and payday advances with same-day funding.
